name: subarr-telemetry
description: Cloudflare Worker that receives anonymous install-heartbeat pings from self-hosted subarr instances and serves aggregated stats. Backs telemetry.subarr.com and subarr.com/stats.

scripts.db:init: wrangler d1 execute subarr-telemetry --remote --file=schema/001_baseline.sql && wrangler d1 execute subarr-telemetry --remote --file=schema/002_crashes.sql
scripts.db:init:local: wrangler d1 execute subarr-telemetry --local --file=schema/001_baseline.sql && wrangler d1 execute subarr-telemetry --local --file=schema/002_crashes.sql
